author: Johannes L.
pros: - the format of the regular exports of the full report - the possibility to make historical exports - the organization of the dashboard - automated triggers for monitoring
cons: - the missing integration of more sopisticated data extraction methods - the limited market intelligence support for other marketplaces than Amazon and missing backend information on sellers like legal name, VAT ID etc.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Easy to use, Easy to understand, Complements my Role.
author: Fausto Alan A.
pros: What I liked the most about this great tool are the bunch of functionalities this has withing the tool. You can respond to customer questions about your products, you can easily forecast losses but most importantly it allows you to have more clarity on how the market is behaving to plan ahead and build stronger strategies.
cons: As of today, i have not find a Cons to the tool.

review_title: Wichtiger Helfer für alle, die mit Amazon Geschäfte machen.
description: Ist in der täglichen Routine im Einsatz und spart sehr viel Zeit.
author: Myriam J.
pros: Sehr übersichtlich und kompakt, alle wichtigen Daten auf einen Blick.
cons: Der Preis ist für kleine Unternehmen verhältnismäßig hoch.

review_title: Das beste Tool für das Amazon Business
description: Der Onboarding Prozess war super und schnell. Man bekommt auf alle Fragen sehr gute Lösungen und Erklärungen. Das Tool erfüllt unsere Anforderungen komplett. Wir empfehlen es definitiv weiter :-)
author: Valentin B.
pros: Eine übersichtliche Darstellung aller wichtigen KPIs
cons: Wir konnten bisher keine Nachteile feststellen

author: Antonia R.
pros: I can get a report on sales etc. relatively easily and quickly. I can also display individual days in a report, which I can't do in VC
cons: Items creation cannot be automatically transferred from VC

description: It is a great tool for data analysis.
author: Geronimo D.
pros: Easy to use. Easy to access and view critical information. Comparison with previous years. Market trends and competition Sell out information ASINS performance Dashboard and Summary
cons: It would be great if data was updated daily.,

author: Ralph N.
pros: AM Visior's tool is perfect for a comprehensive research of the listed products. Quickly see who has the Buy Box, how is the development on this product, sell out figures, returns etc. Simply great

review_title: The best data reporting I have seen
author: Simon B.
pros: Dashboard though I need more training to get even more out of it
cons: Nothing just my knowledge needs to build quickly

description: very happy about it. the combination about reviews, sales makes it very helpful
author: Bjoern W.
pros: as much datas as possible, all in one chart, great contact support
cons: not very easy t ofind certain datas, keep it more simple

review_title: Great tracking platform to drive business results
author: Tommaso A.
pros: very broad and complete overview, where you can deep dive significantly
cons: it takes some time to learn how to use all features
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Tolles Tool zum Schutz der Marke und für Transparenz in Europa
author: Julia N.
pros: - sehr gute Qualitätskontrolle für Content - für viele Länder verfügbar - sorgt für Transparenz in Europa - hilft bei der Vorbereitung der JG mit Amazon - hilft bei der Analyse, auch für Seller - beinhaltet wichtige Daten für Vertrieb, Marketing und Geschäftsführung
cons: - noch nicht für die Nutzung auf kleinen Laptops oder Handys ausgelegt
